title: poa falconeri
intro: Poa falconeri, also known as Falconer's fescue, is a species of grass native to the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Poa falconeri include reducing inflammation and providing relief from coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
